sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.7g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.7g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 11.9g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for fruit, the tradeoff is sweetness versus fibre, satiety, and overall payoff.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 11.9g. the fibre support does a lot of the heavy lifting. for fruit, the tradeoff is sweetness versus fibre, satiety, and overall payoff.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 1.2g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for a fruit, this really comes down to sugar control.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 31% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most. that helps, but vitamins still are not the main selling point.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 31% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most. that helps, but vitamins still are not the main selling point.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 3% DV, magnesium at 5% DV, iron at 4% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 3% DV, magnesium at 5% DV, iron at 4% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. excellent fruit-category fit because very strong fibre moderation and low glycemic behaviour make it a clean example of what the fruit category is supposed to reward. contains useful polyphenols because adds plant-compound value beyond the base nutrient display. light for the volume because a practical advantage for a sweet food.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. quite perishable because storage life is not amazing compared with sturdier fruits. can be pricey because cost can limit how practical it is as a staple fruit. protein contribution is negligible because not a real flaw for fruit, but still basically absent.

closing.summary: Raspberries stands out for excellent fruit-category fit and contains useful polyphenols. but it also gets held back by quite perishable and can be pricey. Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
